# suzanna
Site pour épicerie 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Suzanna - Épicerie des Pays de l'Est - Toulouse</title>
    
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&family=Oswald:wght@500;700&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <script src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/a076d05399.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
    
    <style>
        :root {
            --suzanna-red: #C71F1F;
            --background-white: #FFFFFF;
            --background-blue-dark: #0A1B2D;
            --background-blue-light: #F0F4F8;
            --text-black: #000000;
            --text-grey: #555555;
            --text-white: #FFFFFF;
            --accent-gold: #D4AF37;
            --border-grey: #DDDDDD;
            
            --font-title: 'Playfair Display', serif;
            --font-nav: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            --font-body: 'Open Sans', sans-serif;
        }

        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            font-family: var(--font-body);
            background-color: var(--background-white);
            color: var(--text-black);
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        h1, h2, h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-title);
            margin: 0;
        }

        /* --- Structure --- */
        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 20px;
        }

        /* --- Header / Branding --- */
        header {
            background-color: var(--background-white);
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-grey);
            padding: 10px 0;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        .flag-banner {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .flag {
            width: 50px;
            height: 30px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-grey);
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
        }

        /* Mockup des 8 drapeaux de image_3.png */
        .flag.bl { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAADIAAAAiCAMAAAA/N2GvAAAAGXRFWHRTb2Z0d2FyZQBBZG9iZSBJbWFnZVJlYWR5ccllPAAAAAZQTFRF/5uI/////5uI/7pB9wAAAAN0Uk5T//8A18o95wAAAEpJREFUeNpiYGBghQJmBoQAAlwYEFDQCAnuYBAaAmwYEVDQiAnuYBAKAmw4IUDQ5AcDQE0fDYA1fTSA1vRRA9rTRw5QTx8lQG9/AQIMAEzTBO4e8uA2AAAAAElFTkSuQmCC'); }
        .flag.md { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAADIAAAAiCAMAAAA/N2GvAAAAGXRFWHRTb2Z0d2FyZQBBZG9iZSBJbWFnZVJlYWR5ccllPAAAAAZQTFRF/5uI/7pB8P8B/////5uI/7pB8P8B/////6pB+gAAAAN0Uk5T//8A18o95wAAAEpJREFUeNpiYGBghQJmBoQAAlwYEFDQCAnuYBAaAmwYEVDQiAnuYBAKAmw4IUDQ5AcDQE0fDYA1fTSA1vRRA9rTRw5QTx8lQG9/AQIMAEzTBO4e8uA2AAAAAElFTkSuQmCC'); }
        .flag.ge { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAADIAAAAiCAMAAAA/N2GvAAAAGXRFWHRTb2Z0d2FyZQBBZG9iZSBJbWFnZVJlYWR5ccllPAAAAAZQTFRF/5uI/////5uI/8pB//8A9wAAAAN0Uk5T//8A18o95wAAAEpJREFUeNpiYGBghQJmBoQAAlwYEFDQCAnuYBAaAmwYEVDQiAnuYBAKAmw4IUDQ5AcDQE0fDYA1fTSA1vRRA9rTRw5QTx8lQG9/AQIMAEzTBO4e8uA2AAAAAElFTkSuQmCC'); }
        .flag.ua { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,'); }
        .flag.pl { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAADIAAAAiCAMAAAA/N2GvAAAAGXRFWHRTb2Z0d2FyZQBBZG9iZSBJbWFnZVJlYWR5ccllPAAAAAZQTFRF/////5uI/////5uI/////5uI/////6pB9wAAAAN0Uk5T//8A18o95wAAAEpJREFUeNpiYGBghQJmBoQAAlwYEFDQCAnuYBAaAmwYEVDQiAnuYBAKAmw4IUDQ5AcDQE0fDYA1fTSA1vRRA9rTRw5QTx8lQG9/AQIMAEzTBO4e8uA2AAAAAElFTkSuQmCC'); }
        .flag.ru { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,'); }
        .flag.am { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,'); }
        .flag.ro { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,'); }

        .branding-title-curved {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-nav);
            color: var(--suzanna-red);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .branding-main-name {
            font-family: var(--font-title);
            color: var(--suzanna-red);
            font-size: 4rem;
            text-align: center;
            margin: 0;
            line-height: 0.9;
        }

        .main-nav {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 25px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        .main-nav a {
            text-decoration: none;
            font-family: var(--font-nav);
            color: var(--text-grey);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 5px;
            transition: color 0.3s, border-bottom 0.3s;
        }

        .main-nav a:hover {
            color: var(--suzanna-red);
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--suzanna-red);
        }

        /* --- Hero Section --- */
        .hero {
            background-color: var(--background-blue-dark);
            background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,' alt="Hero Image">
            <div class="hero-content">
                <div class="container">
                    <h1>Bienvenue chez SUZANNA</h1>
                    <p>Découvrez les saveurs authentiques de l'Est.</p>
                    <a href="#products" class="btn">Voir les Produits</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        /* --- Adresse Bar (Prominente) --- */
        .address-bar {
            background-color: var(--suzanna-red);
            color: var(--text-white);
            padding: 30px 0;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .address-bar .huge-address {
            font-family: var(--font-nav);
            font-size: 3.5rem;
            margin: 0;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        /* --- Produits --- */
        .products {
            padding: 60px 0;
            background-color: var(--background-blue-light);
        }

        .products h2 {
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        .product-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 30px;
        }

        .product-card {
            background-color: var(--background-white);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-grey);
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .product-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .product-image {
            width: 100%;
            height: 250px;
            background-size: contain;
            background-position: center;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-color: #f9f9f9;
        }

        .product-info {
            padding: 20px;
            flex-grow: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .product-title {
            font-family: var(--font-title);
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .product-origin {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: var(--text-grey);
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .product-price {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--suzanna-red);
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .product-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .btn-add {
            background-color: var(--accent-gold);
            color: var(--text-black);
            border: none;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            flex-grow: 1;
            font-family: var(--font-nav);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: background 0.3s;
        }

        .btn-add:hover {
            background-color: #C19A2E;
        }

        /* --- Commande Spéciale / Livraison --- */
        .order-systems {
            padding: 60px 0;
            display: flex;
            gap: 40px;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .order-panel {
            flex: 1;
            background-color: var(--background-white);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-grey);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 30px;
        }

        .order-panel h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-title);
            color: var(--suzanna-red);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .system-choice {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .system-btn {
            background-color: var(--background-blue-dark);
            color: var(--text-white);
            border: none;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: var(--font-nav);
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .form-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .form-group input, .form-group textarea, .form-group select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-grey);
            border-radius: 4px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* --- À Propos --- */
        .about {
            padding: 60px 0;
            background-color: var(--background-blue-light);
        }

        .about-content {
            display: flex;
            gap: 40px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .about-text {
            flex: 2;
        }

        .about h2 {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .about-image {
            flex: 1;
            width: 100%;
            height: 300px;
            background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,
